name: examsnim-helper-suite
description: Shortcut-style Codex helper skills for superpower execution, UI/UX Pro Max, SEO, sitemap, tests, memory, multi-agent review, security, performance, deployment and ExamsNim platform work.

interface.longDescription: A curated Codex helper suite for planning, UI/UX Pro Max, SEO/sitemap, tests, memory, multi-agent review, security, performance, deployment and ExamsNim product/backend work.
defaultPrompt: Use $superpower to plan, implement, review and test this repository task.
Use $uiux-pro-max to audit frontend UI/UX, motion, accessibility and conversion polish.
Use $seo-sitemap-pro to audit metadata, robots.txt, canonical URLs and sitemap.xml.
Use $multi-agent-squad to spawn focused review agents and consolidate results.
